general.title: Append Annotation [SPAC] [DMAP]
general.instructions:
Append new annotation columns with single label to the dataset.\
Please refer to DUET Documentation, GitHub Documentation

parameters.name: Annotation Pair List
parameters.description:
List of string pairs representing the new annotation and its label.
Each pair should have this format:
        <new annotation column name>:<value of the annotation> without the '<' and '>' characters.
The values must be a single string or numeric value
